calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses
To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Requests For Admission
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW SHIREY'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

Appearances via Zoom:
Vladie Viltman of G3MH, LLP (415.673.5600, VViltman@g3mh.com) for plaintiff and moving party;
Elsa Berry of Akay Law (415.764.1999, eberry@akaylaw.com) for defendants and opposing parties.

Argued and the court rules that the motion is granted as to:

- requests 25 and 26,
- requests for admissions 6, 7, 8, 10 are to be answered in full, with the knowledge that defendants have as of the date they respond
